productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Women Solid Blue Handbags
description: Update your style quotient with ease by adding this stylish bag from united colors of benetton to your outfit. Stylish and comfortable to carry, the boxy silhouette of this bag blends well with urban casuals and formals.  Outer made of PU, with an inner lining made of 100% polyester One roomy zippered compartment with a mobile pouch insideOne zippered compartment on the front Branded zippers and sliders Padded handles with a PU covering Care Wipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust
